message:
feat(fuzz): io_uring + classic AIO harness

crates/frankenlibc-fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_io_uring.rs covers both
async-IO surfaces in one harness:

  - io_uring_setup / io_uring_enter / io_uring_register
    bounded entries (≤16), guarded io_uring_params buffer with
    32-byte sentinels on both sides verified post-call, NULL-params
    EFAULT branch, and bogus-fd error paths.
  - io_setup / io_destroy / io_submit / io_cancel / io_getevents
    short-lived ctx lifecycle, NULL-iocbpp EFAULT branch, fuzz-shaped
    timeout for io_getevents.

Verified via rch with CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_libc_cc_iouring:
49K runs over 60s, no crashes. Exec rate is lower than memfd-only
harnesses because io_uring_setup actually allocates rings; that's
fine — the contract is correctness, not speed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
